history.name: Sprint 05 — LA API restaurant pipeline
goals: Ingest the LA restaurant API with dlt and model it through staging, intermediate, and final dbt outputs

phase_log.result: Environment verified with venv/bin tools. SCRUM-5 requirements drafted from Confluence and awaiting requirements approved.
Requirements regenerated from Confluence after requirements ready. Draft now includes the dog breed column requirement and is awaiting requirements approved.
Requirements approved by TPM. Locked approved draft for SCRUM-5 and ready to begin Phase 1.
Generated staging and intermediate schema contracts plus ACTIVE_ASSUMPTIONS.md for SCRUM-5. Awaiting assumptions approval before implementation.
Assumptions regenerated from Confluence after assumptions ready. A1 and A2 were approved, and A3 was revised to use a unique DBA-name grain for LA API staging. Awaiting assumptions approved.
TPM approved the SCRUM-5 assumptions set. The DBA-name grain decision is now locked and Phase 2 implementation may begin.
Implemented the LA API dlt loader, the new staging model stg_la_restaurants, and the downstream int_seafood_restaurants, int_cats, int_cats_dogs, and cat_review_profile SQL models.
Loaded the LA API into DuckDB and verified the sprint model chain with dbt build. PASS 40/40, 0 errors, 0 warnings.
Aligned the DAG and dbt to the same absolute DuckDB path and verified dags/dbt_pipeline_dag.py parses successfully.
Archived SCRUM-5 requirements and summary, reset the active workspace template, and closed the sprint.

history.name: Sprint 01 — Staging Data
goals: Create 5 staging models from 3 source types (MSSQL, seed CSV, S3)

phase_log.result: schema.yml + sources.yml + ACTIVE_ASSUMPTIONS.md generated. 5 assumptions logged. BLOCKER: DuckDB MSSQL extension does not exist (A1).
Requirements updated on Confluence (v2). Seed data now 2 columns (restaurant_id, review). A3 resolved. All 5 assumptions resolved. schema.yml updated.
5 staging SQL models + seed CSV created. All columns match schema.yml exactly.
dbt compile OK. dbt seed OK (3 rows). dbt run OK (5 models). dbt test PASS 21/21. 0 errors.
DAG syntax validated. Flow: dlt_ingest >> dbt_seed >> dbt_transform (Cosmos).
